commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers need to accept the compatibility impact and choose this clean PR as the canonical fix over the older conflicting branch.; Cleared: The diff tightens an existing route boundary and adds tests without new dependencies, workflow changes, package-resolution changes, permissions, or secret-handling changes. (sha=45e6698d553e29ea6db10e797f4ae460af3a6c8f)
commands.review_summary:
This PR tightens voice-call realtime WebSocket upgrade matching to exact-or-slash-child paths and adds bound `VoiceCallWebhookServer` regression tests for valid child, sibling rejection, and root stream-path behavior.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +139. Total +150 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.6 use `pathname.startsWith(pattern)`, so `/voice/stream/realtime-extra/token` matches a configured `/voice/stream/realtime` path by source inspection; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers need to accept the compatibility impact and choose this clean PR as the canonical fix over the older conflicting branch.

target.title: fix(voice-call): require realtime websocket path boundary
target.body:
## Summary

- Tightens realtime voice WebSocket upgrade routing so same-prefix sibling paths no longer enter the realtime handler.
- Keeps intended realtime stream URLs working: exact stream path matches, slash-delimited token child paths match, and `realtime.streamPath = "/"` still accepts root child paths.
- Moves the regression proof into `extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts`, using a real `VoiceCallWebhookServer` upgrade request against an ephemeral localhost port.

## What Changed

| Case | Before | After |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Configured stream path `/voice/stream/realtime`, request `/voice/stream/realtime/token` | Routed to realtime handler | Routed to realtime handler |
| Configured stream path `/voice/stream/realtime`, request `/voice/stream/realtime-extra/token` | Routed by raw `startsWith(pattern)` | Rejected by the realtime route predicate |
| Configured stream path `/`, request `/token` | Routed to realtime handler | Routed to realtime handler |

## Route Decision

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  A[WebSocket upgrade request] --> B[Read configured realtime stream path]
  B --> C{stream path configured?}
  C -- no --> D[Do not route to realtime handler]
  C -- yes --> E[Normalize configured path and request path]
  E --> F{configured path is /?}
  F -- yes --> G[Route root child path to realtime handler]
  F -- no --> H{request equals configured path or starts with configured path + /?}
  H -- yes --> I[Route to realtime handler]
  H -- no --> J[Leave sibling path out of realtime handler]
```

## How To Test

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts
./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts
git diff --check
```

## Verification

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts
# 1 file passed, 42 tests passed

node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts
# 2 files passed, 61 tests passed

node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts
# passed

./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts
# passed

git diff --check
# passed
```

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Realtime voice WebSocket upgrade routing accepted same-prefix sibling paths such as `/voice/stream/realtime-extra/token` for a configured realtime stream path of `/voice/stream/realtime`.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS with Node, running the real `VoiceCallWebhookServer` on an ephemeral localhost TCP port through the webhook regression harness.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: Terminal output from the post-fix local run showed the webhook regression file passing against the real bound server path, including the realtime WebSocket upgrade routing cases:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts

extensions/voice-call/src/webhook.test.ts
  VoiceCallWebhookServer realtime WebSocket routing
    ✓ does not route sibling paths through the realtime stream handler
    ✓ routes root stream child paths through the realtime stream handler

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       42 passed (42)
```

Observed result after fix: `/voice/stream/realtime/token` reached the realtime handler and returned the test handler's 401 response. `/voice/stream/realtime-extra/token` did not increase the realtime handler call count. With `realtime.streamPath = "/"`, `/token` still reached the realtime handler.

What was not tested: External telephony-provider infrastructure and remote reverse-proxy ingress were not exercised; this proof is limited to the local OpenClaw webhook server route boundary and WebSocket upgrade dispatch.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
